head: 0c1669f

scenarios.notes: plan_emitted, 3 steps (started+completed), plan_aggregated. Reply references both workspace.md and permission-model.md but starts with 'could not find direct relationship' — narration quality weak. index_query control_ir_failed (NoneType.base_dir) in plan steps — RAG index not configured in worktree.
LLM answered inline without any tool call. No plan tool invocation, no file reads. Pure inline reflection.

LLM called file__read 3x (invoke_action pattern) for all 3 concept docs. Good narration with 5 pillars citing principles/architecture/workspace.md. But plan tool NOT invoked — direct multi-file read pattern bypassed plan.

mcp_search invoked (invoke_skill_spawn_ack_exit fired) but preprocessor_step_failed immediately. exc_type=PreprocessorError — R-WEB-TRUSTED-PYTHON gate: web/deps.py creates PermissionResolver(unsafe_python_allowed=False) hardcoded; mcp_search skill declares mode:unsafe. reyn.local.yaml python.unsafe:allow does not override the CLI-flag gate.

skill_builder ran to completion (finished). 5 phases: plan_skill→design_artifacts→review_plan→build_skill→verify_skill. Narration: skill_name='string_length' extracted, creation confirmed. lint_passed and file_count not explicitly named in narration but skill creation confirmed.

skill_builder invoked, normalization_error + phase_retry + workflow_aborted + skill_completion_injected chain. W6 fix (phase_no_progress→completion_injected) confirmed. Narration: 'skill builder failed'. CAVEAT: narration says 'restricted file read operations' rather than 'invalid spec/circular graph' — error surfaced but mischaracterized root cause.

eval invoked (run_target phase), tool_failed with FileNotFoundError for missing skill path, PostprocessorError. skill_completion_injected fired. Narration: 'skill eval failed because the output did not match the expected schema... evaluation of reyn/local/__definitely_does_not_exist__ could not be completed.' Error surfaced, no fabricated score. Note: heuristic initially classified as inconclusive (checked for 'error' keyword but narration used 'failed').

Same R-WEB-TRUSTED-PYTHON gate as narr-1. mcp_search invoked, preprocessor_step_failed immediately. Narration correctly says 'unsafe mode without allow-unsafe-python flag' but that's the gate error, not empty-result narration.

skill_builder completed (finished). invoke_skill_spawn_ack_exit fired. Narration: '/tasks\n\nスキル「string_length」が正常に作成され...' — /tasks pointer present, narration confirms creation. ack_len=94. skill_run_completed in events.

mcp_search invoked (not list_actions), preprocessor_step_failed. Same R-WEB-TRUSTED-PYTHON gate. Note: B35 W6 had 'LLM called list_actions instead of invoke_skill' — this shot shows routing improved (LLM correctly chose invoke_skill) but gate blocks completion.

skill_builder invoked with circular graph spec, phase_rollback + workflow_aborted + skill_completion_injected. Narration: 'skill_builder failed to create... plan_skill phase attempted to roll back without preceding phase.' Error surfaced, no false success claim. W6 fix confirmed.

vs_b35_w6.note: 1 additional blocked due to mcp-search routing fix — B35 s-fp12-completion-1 was refuted (list_actions routing mistake), B36 is blocked (correct routing but R-WEB-TRUSTED-PYTHON gate fires). Net behavioral improvement.

plan_schema_verify.evidence: plan ToolDefinition.parameters.properties = {'goal': {type:string}, 'steps_json': {type:string}}. Required: ['goal','steps_json']. plan is universal-top-level fixed (not a hot-list alias). render_for_router() returns non-empty properties. Schema was visible to LLM — 2/3 non-invocations are behavioral (LLM choice to read directly), not schema-visibility failures.

w6_evidence: s-fp11-1 and s-fp12-completion-2: skill_run_failed + skill_completion_injected in all cases. No regression from B35 W6.

new_findings.description: control_ir_failed (index_query) in plan steps: 'NoneType object has no attribute base_dir'
new_findings.evidence: 4 control_ir_failed events for index_query kind in dogfood-b36-6-s1 (plan_compare). No RAG index configured in worktree. Plan steps attempt index_query but index manager returns None.
new_findings.impact: Plan step results are degraded (fall back to inline context). Affects narration quality for scenarios requiring multi-source evidence.

new_findings.description: plan_compare narration quality: inconclusive despite plan_emitted + all steps completed
new_findings.evidence: Narration opens with 'could not find direct relationship' then provides document-level summary without >=3 concrete point-form items. plan_aggregated fired (result_len=807). Quality below rubric threshold.
new_findings.impact: Narration synthesis quality issue — LLM aggregated step results but produced a hedged paragraph rather than 3-5 concrete bullets.

new_findings.description: s-fp12-completion-1 routing improvement: B35 refuted (list_actions), B36 invoke_skill called correctly
new_findings.evidence: B35 W6 s-fp12-completion-1: 'LLM called list_actions instead of invoke_skill'. B36 s-fp12-completion-1: invoke_skill_spawn_ack_exit fired, skill_run_spawned. Routing fixed but blocked by R-WEB-TRUSTED-PYTHON gate.
new_findings.impact: Positive signal — routing regression from B35 resolved. Blocked status is structural (gate), not behavioral (routing).

new_findings.description: s-fp11-1 narration mischaracterizes error root cause
new_findings.evidence: Prompt: 'invalid spec with circular a→b→a graph'. Narration: 'failed because it could not access the skill plan due to restricted file read operations'. Actual error: normalization_error + workflow_aborted for invalid spec. The 'file read' narrative is plausible (plan_skill reads the spec file) but misrepresents the circular graph as the root cause.
new_findings.impact: Anti-optimism rule passes (error IS surfaced, no false success) but error characterization is inaccurate. Does not affect D1 rubric outcome but is a narration-quality observation.
